description.en: A round, lightly sweet Ethiopian Sabbath bread perfumed with turmeric, coriander and nigella, mixed as a wet dough and fermented overnight before a long, slow bake in a covered pot. Ethiopian Jewish families serve it as their Friday-night challah.
description.de: Ein rundes, leicht süßes äthiopisches Sabbatbrot mit Kurkuma, Koriander und Schwarzkümmel, als feuchter Teig über Nacht fermentiert vor langsamem Backen im gedeckten Topf. Äthiopisch-jüdische Familien servieren es als Challah am Freitagabend.
description.es: Un pan de sabbat etíope redondo y dulce, con cúrcuma, cilantro y nigella, en masa húmeda fermentada toda la noche antes de una cocción lenta en una olla tapada. Las familias judías etíopes lo sirven como su jalá del viernes por la noche.
description.fr: Un pain de sabbat éthiopien rond et sucré, parfumé au curcuma, à la coriandre et à la nigelle, en pâte humide fermentée toute la nuit avant une cuisson lente en cocotte couverte. Les familles juives éthiopiennes le servent le vendredi soir.

origin.region: Ethiopia and Ethiopian Jewish (Beta Israel) communities, now largely in Israel
origin.note: Amharic dabo simply means bread, but the word is used for this festive round loaf served at Sabbath and holidays, unlike the everyday injera. Closely related to Eritrean himbasha.

yield.shape: large round loaf baked in a covered pot

keeping.note: Keeps 5 to 7 days refrigerated in an airtight container, true to its role as a bread made once for a whole week of holiday meals.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Combine the flours, turmeric, coriander and nigella in a large bowl. Separately mix water, oil, yeast, salt and sugar, then stir the two together into a wet, sticky dough.

method.title: Long rise
method.summary: Transfer to a well-oiled bowl at least twice the dough's size, cover, and let ferment overnight or at least 8 hours at room temperature.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Line a covered ovenproof pot with oiled parchment, transfer the dough in, and let rise 30 minutes more.

method.title: Bake covered
method.summary: Cover the pot tightly and bake until set, 45 to 50 minutes.

method.title: Flip and finish
method.summary: Turn the loaf out onto a rack, then return it upside down to the pot and bake 10 minutes more to brown the top.

source.adaptation: Cup/teaspoon/tablespoon quantities converted to grams; turmeric and nigella weights estimated using standard ground-spice density.
